msg: rang the register on my entire $RKLB stake — the thesis fully played out so I closed it, zero shares left
the gap up gave me my exit on $CRDO — dumped what was left of the position, flat now
wrapped up my $HOOD trade today — sold every share, nothing left on the books, time to move on
exited $RDDT in full, no longer like the setup
stopped out of $ALAB on the break of support
sold down about a third of my $NBIS on this rip to lock some gains — bulk of the position stays on
lightening up on $IOT at these levels — sold a chunk to bank profit but leaving a runner on
this pop let me cut my $TMDX back by 50% and bank the profit, still riding the other half
shaved a little $OSCR into the pop to de-risk, sold maybe a quarter — long-term story is intact so keeping the rest
$AFRM sold off hard today on the short report, no news of substance though
watching $NET into the print, might add if it holds the 50-week
the market dumped into the close, $SPY $QQQ both red, ugly tape
removing $MU from the watchlist, never got the entry I wanted
no position in $AVGO, just commentary on the HBM read-through
